prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of UBER stock, which typically exhibits 25-35% annualized volatility. Over a 21-day period, this translates to approximately 5-7% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward momentum given rideshare sector recovery trends. Confidence intervals are constructed using geometric Brownian motion assumptions with volatility-adjusted ranges: 50% CI covers ±1 standard deviation scenario, 80% CI covers ±1.3 standard deviations, and 90% CI covers ±1.65 standard deviations from the expected return.
